title: Pet Hud
description: Always know if your furry friends are safe or not.
body:
Pet HUD allows you to pin your pets to your HUD so you can always see their health and armor durability (for wolves).

Simply tame an animal like a wolf, cat or parrot, and open the menu using P, from here you can pin, name and even rotate the models of your pets. Its quite fancy!

You can have up to 3 pets pinned to the side of your hotbar, and it will show a durability bar for each pet showing their health. If one of your wolves has armor equipped, it's durability bar will turn cyan untill it breaks. 

This works quite similiar to how [uku's Armor HUD](https://modrinth.com/mod/ukus-armor-hud) works where your armor durability is shown to to your HUD, but instead of armor, its your pets!

**Pets in the HUD:**

![HUD](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1b10abf212afb1013cfe7b959e3b70c6188c88b6.png)

When you name a pet using the menu, it will have a name tag (only visible to you) which will show the name you put in.

If a pet manages to get out of your render distance, it will be marked as missing and it's last known coordinates will be shown when you hover over the question where the model usually is.

**Missing Pet:**

![Missing pet](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/04d50e086397df89478946e945abc72ceb6c10c6.png)

If you are near pets that are not pinned to your HUD, they will show up under "Nearby Pets", here you can name and pin them to your HUD:

**Nearby Pets:**

![Nearby Pets:](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/41697afc4ba6460bc55965fd965212a26b20c193_0.webp)

**You can also rotate the models of your pet by dragging the model:** (Sorry about the water mark, i couldnt find a compressor tool that worked for gifs.)

![Rotating Models](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d0013eb3892a52eb33ba49d2a148057f06ae50a6.gif)

# Dependencies:
- [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)
- Client side only
- Currently only available for 1.21 - 1.21.1
